theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

narrative.summary: Talen Energy: 정량 종합 72점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 65 / 중기 74 / 장기 74. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 약과열
overheat.guidance: 분할매수만. 한 번에 들어가지 말고 1/3~1/2씩 나눠서.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 5.0% → 2-ATR 손절폭 10.0%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 2개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA, 일봉 200MA. 현재가 대비 +15.0% 위치. T1 $450.6 (R:R 2.4)
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $370.7 아래 손절가 $336.6 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

narrative.summary: Micron: 정량 종합 68점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 62 / 중기 68 / 장기 72. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)

top_news.title: Value Investing Legend Seth Klarman: Masters in Business
top_news.summary: Barry sits down with Munger disciple Seth Klarman, CEO of Baupost Group, a Boston-based investment manager with a multi-strategy approach. They discuss Seth's start as a 25 year-old and journey to CEO. They also discuss his approach to risk, IPOs, and sectors along with his sports passions including a smaller ownership in the Boston Red Sox, horse racing, and his feelings about the Boston Celtics' 2026 season. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Latin American FX Edge Higher With Markets in ‘Holding Pattern’
top_news.summary: Most Latin American currencies advanced in a quiet session for global markets amid holidays in the US and parts of Asia, leaving assets in a holding pattern as traders await fresh news out of the Middle East.

top_news.title: Stocks Stall as Iran Nuclear Talks Hit Early Snag: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Global stocks are ending a strong week on a cautious note as relief over an interim peace deal between the US and Iran gave way to a focus on the challenges of securing a lasting agreement.

top_news.title: ‘Take Risk’: Canada Regulator Cuts Bank Capital Level to Boost Lending
top_news.summary: Canada’s financial regulator lowered capital requirements for the country’s largest banks for the first time in three years, giving them the flexibility to lend more to support a domestic push for defense spending, infrastructure and artificial intelligence.

top_news.title: Canada Imposes Temporary 10% Tariff on Canned Vegetables
top_news.summary: Canada applied a 10% import tax on imports of canned vegetables to protect domestic growers and food processors, the Department of Finance said in a statement Friday.

top_news.title: Brookfield Is Said to Lead Bidding for Drahi’s XpFibre Business
top_news.summary: Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. is emerging as the frontrunner to acquire a controlling stake in telecom tycoon Patrick Drahi’s French fiber optic company XpFibre, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

top_news.title: First Quantum Deemed Broadly Compliant at Panama Copper Mine
top_news.summary: Panama moved closer to deciding whether First Quantum Minerals Ltd. can reopen a giant copper mine after receiving a long-awaited audit that found the project met most of its environmental, legal, fiscal and operational obligations.

top_news.title: Global Stocks End Strong Week on Cautious Note
top_news.summary:
Global stocks are ending a strong week on a cautious note as relief over an interim peace deal between the US and Iran gave way to a focus on the challenges of securing a lasting agreement.
Anneka Treon, Global Head of Private Banking, Wealth Management, and Investments at ING Investments, discusses her outlook for Europe, client concerns, and the broader macro picture. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: India Stock Regulator Lets Firms Buy Back Shares From Market
top_news.summary: India’s securities regulator will reintroduce open-market buybacks for companies, a move that could bolster shares prices as local equities have lagged global peers.

top_news.title: Aspen Disruption Triggers South Africa Contraceptive Shortage
top_news.summary: A disruption at Aspen Pharmacare Holdings Ltd.’s manufacturing facilities has led to shortages of oral contraceptives across South Africa, according to the health department and a local pharmacy chain.
